summary: Security Features Testing Complete - Password Reset, 2FA, Audit Logging, Data Isolation all verified working. 27 backend tests passed, 1 skipped. Frontend Security & Audit Logs tabs verified.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - existing issue from previous iteration

critical_code_review_comments: Password Reset Flow: Working correctly with token generation, validation, and password update
2FA Implementation: Uses pyotp TOTP with valid_window=1, includes backup codes and QR code generation
Audit Logging: All security events (login, failed login, password reset, 2FA setup/enable/disable) are logged
Data Isolation: Super Admin sees all data, Admin sees hierarchical data (self + children), User/Advertiser see only their own data
Change Password: Requires current password verification before allowing password change

success_rate.backend: 100% (27/27 tests passed, 1 skipped due to missing creative data)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Security tab and Audit Logs features working

seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests are automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features fully tested and working. 2FA flow uses pyotp.TOTP for code generation. Password reset returns token directly in demo mode (would send email in production). Audit logs are stored in 'audit_logs' MongoDB collection.

password_reset_flow.description: POST /api/auth/password-reset/request returns reset_token -> POST /api/auth/password-reset/confirm with token resets password -> login with new password works

password_reset_security.description: Invalid tokens rejected, used tokens cannot be reused, non-existent emails handled gracefully

change_password.description: POST /api/auth/change-password requires current password and updates password

2fa_setup.description: POST /api/auth/2fa/setup (admin only) returns secret, qr_code_url, backup_codes
2fa_setup.evidence: Test: test_2fa_setup_returns_secret passed, UI shows QR code dialog

2fa_login_flow.description: Login with 2FA enabled returns requires_2fa:true and temp_token -> POST /api/auth/verify-2fa with code returns session token

2fa_disable.description: POST /api/auth/2fa/disable with valid TOTP code removes 2FA

2fa_backup_codes.description: Backup codes can be used for login instead of TOTP code

audit_logging_login.description: Login events logged with user details and timestamp
audit_logging_login.evidence: Test: test_login_creates_audit_log passed, UI shows auth.login events

audit_logging_2fa.evidence: UI shows 2fa.setup and 2fa.enable events in Audit Logs tab

data_isolation_campaigns.description: Campaigns filtered by ownership - Super Admin sees all, Admin sees hierarchical, User sees own

data_isolation_creatives.description: Same ownership filtering pattern as campaigns

security_tab_ui.description: Admin Panel shows Security tab for Admin/Super Admin with 2FA enable/disable UI
security_tab_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows Security tab with 2FA section and Enable 2FA button

2fa_setup_dialog_ui.description: 2FA setup dialog shows QR code, secret key, backup codes, and verification input
2fa_setup_dialog_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows full 2FA setup dialog with all elements

audit_logs_tab_ui.description: Super Admin sees Audit Logs tab with log entries
audit_logs_tab_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows Audit Logs tab with auth.login and 2fa events, Refresh button
